versions.changelog:
## What's New

- Fork release with GitHub Pages plugin repository and automated CI/CD publishing
- Fix Meta Quest 3 DLNA playback when indexed browse omits stream URLs
- Add episode list image source setting and improve startup index UI
- Fix DLNA Browse cache reliability and restore thumbnail performance
- Reorganize DLNA settings UI into tabbed layout with clearer help text
- Add DLNA browse poster/thumbnail display for virtual folder lists
- Add virtual folders for mixed, home videos, and music video libraries
- Add SQLite virtual folder indexes and layered browse caches for performance
- Add Browse By Kana classification, paging settings, and Quest compatibility mode
- Add 3D, 4K, 8K, and VR video support
- Pin Jellyfin API packages to 10.11.10 for Jellyfin 10.11.x compatibility

## Install

Add this plugin repository in Jellyfin Dashboard → Plugins → Repositories:

https://yuuta0331.github.io/jellyfin-plugin-dlna/manifest.json
